declarations.description:
Canvas-based graph visualization component. Renders nodes, edges, and clusters
on an HTML canvas with pan, zoom, and interactive selection support.
declarations.name: GraphCanvas

members.name: interactionState
members.default: { pan: { x: window.innerWidth / 2, y: window.innerHeight / 2 }, zoom: 1, isDragging: false, draggedNodeId: null, draggedClusterId: null, lastMousePos: { x: 0, y: 0 }, clickedEmptySpace: false, hasMoved: false, hoveredNode: null, hoveredCluster: null, }

members.name: manualNodePositions
members.default: new Map<string, { x: number; y: number }>()

members.name: manualClusterPositions
members.default: new Map<string, { x: number; y: number }>()

members.name: fadingOutNodes
members.default: new Map<string, { node: GraphNode; startTime: number }>()

declarations.description:
Root application component that orchestrates the entire graph visualization.
Accepts graph data via `.nodes` and `.edges` properties, making it a
self-contained web component that can be embedded in any host application.
declarations.name: GraphApp

members.name: loadRawGraph
members.description:
Load raw Tuist graph JSON (the output of `tuist graph --format json`).
Transforms it into GraphData and sets nodes/edges automatically.
Shows user-facing warnings/errors via ErrorService if the transform has issues.

declarations.summary: Embeddable graph visualization entry point

Determines whether an edge should be visible based on cluster context.

members.name: palette
members.default: [ '#f7f1da', // soft warm off-white '#f5e0b5', // warmer, almost golden '#d6e0ff', // occasional cool blue-white ]

members.name: setOptions
members.description:
Update configuration at runtime.
Existing stars are preserved until you call `generate`/`resizeIfNeeded`.

members.name: setColors
members.description:
Set the star color palette. Expects [warm, golden, cool].
Takes effect on the next `generate()` call.

members.name: needsRegeneration
members.description: True if the starfield needs to be regenerated for the given dimensions.

members.name: resizeIfNeeded
members.description: Convenience: regenerate stars if the canvas size changed.

members.name: generate
members.description:
Generate stars for the given canvas dimensions.
Call this on initialization and when canvas resizes.

members.name: renderVignette
members.description:
Render a subtle vignette overlay that darkens canvas edges.
The gradient is cached and only recreated when dimensions change.

members.name: clear
members.description: Clear all stars (e.g. when tearing down the canvas)

declarations.description:
Virtual renderer that only creates DOM elements for nodes visible in the viewport.
Dramatically improves performance with large graphs (10,000+ nodes).
declarations.name: GraphVirtualRenderer

declarations.summary: Viewport-culled virtual node renderer

declarations.description:
Displays package/project badge with sharp styling and monospace typography.
Wrapper around graph-badge with container styling.
declarations.name: GraphClusterTypeBadge

members.name: clusterType
members.description: The type of cluster (package or project)

members.name: clusterColor
members.description: The color to use for the badge (hex or CSS color)

attributes.description: The type of cluster (package or project)

attributes.name: cluster-color
attributes.description: The color to use for the badge (hex or CSS color)

declarations.description:
An expandable/collapsible section with animated chevron.
Used for filter sections, details panels, and other expandable content.
declarations.name: GraphCollapsibleSection

slots.description: Optional icon to display before the title
slots.name: icon

members.name: title
members.description: The section title

members.name: isExpanded
members.description: Whether the section is expanded

events.name: toggle
events.description: Dispatched when the header is clicked

declarations.summary: Expandable/collapsible section with animated chevron

declarations.description:
Displays a warning banner when circular dependencies are detected in the graph.
Shows the number of cycles and allows users to expand details or dismiss the warning.
declarations.name: GraphCycleWarning

events.name: dismiss
events.description: Dispatched when the warning is dismissed

declarations.summary: Dismissible circular dependency warning banner

declarations.description:
A unified icon component for filter sections.
Renders product-types, platforms, projects, and packages icons.
declarations.name: GraphFilterIcon

members.name: name
members.description: The icon name to render

members.name: size
members.description: Icon size in pixels

declarations.summary: Filter section icon with multiple named variants

declarations.description:
A consistent container for sections within panels.
Provides padding, borders, and flex-shrink control.
declarations.name: GraphPanelSection

members.name: bordered
members.description: Whether to show a bottom border

members.name: padding
members.description: Padding size

members.name: shrink
members.description: Whether to prevent shrinking (flex-shrink: 0)

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Whether to show a bottom border

declarations.summary: Panel section container with configurable padding and borders

declarations.description:
Top header component with bold identity. Features scan line effect,
glowing logo, and monospace typography.
declarations.name: GraphHeader
declarations.summary: Mission control themed header bar

declarations.description:
Placeholder content for tabs that are coming soon.
Displays a centered message with title.

declarations.description:
Left sidebar navigation with staggered entrance animations.
Features noise texture, accent borders, and monospace typography.
declarations.name: GraphSidebar
